summary: Iteration 84 — validated 3 features: (1) NL scheduling parse+create, (2) merged-template-override propagation into chart-brief / prior-sections / draft-sections, (3) per-location/provider id-picker dropdowns on AITemplatesPage. Backend cross-suite (test_ai_context_documentation + test_portal_visit_brief + test_scribe + test_post_scribe_ai + test_nl_scheduling): 43 passed + 1 skipped (xml at /app/test_reports/pytest/iter84_ai_all.xml). Extra ad-hoc checks: prior-sections + draft-sections regenerate with active tenant overrides return 200 (no 500), NL parse hallucination guard returns 200 with no fake provider, NL create happy-path returns 200 with appointment id. Frontend NL Quick-book e2e (doctor): /scheduling renders [data-testid=nl-book-card] above the toolbar; typed 'Book Hannah Whitaker for an adjustment with Dr. Carter next Friday at 10am' → parse → patient-resolved='Hannah Whitaker', provider-resolved='Dr. Noah Carter', start prefilled 2026-05-08T10:00 (Friday 10:00 local), Confirm created the appointment which now shows on Fri May 8 10:00 in the calendar. CRITICAL FRONTEND BUG: AITemplatesPage location/provider Select dropdowns are empty because /app/frontend/src/pages/settings/AITemplatesPage.jsx calls api.get('/locations') and api.get('/users?role=doctor') which both return 404 in this tenant build. Correct endpoints exist: /api/tenancy/me/context (returns locations[]) and /api/auth/users?role=doctor. Net effect: admins cannot add ANY location- or provider-scoped override from the UI (the free-text input was removed in the same change).

ui_bugs.issue: GET /api/locations 404 and GET /api/users?role=doctor 404 — wrong endpoints. Use /api/tenancy/me/context (response.locations[]) and /api/auth/users?role=doctor instead. Result: scope=Location and scope=Provider dropdowns are always empty so admin can no longer save location/provider-scoped overrides. Free-text input was replaced, so this is a regression — there is no fallback path.

action_items: Fix AITemplatesPage location/provider lookup: replace api.get('/locations') with api.get('/tenancy/me/context').then(r => r.data?.locations || []) and replace api.get('/users', { params: { role: 'doctor' } }) with api.get('/auth/users', { params: { role: 'doctor' } }). After fix, retest: scope=Location and scope=Provider dropdowns must populate, save must succeed, and the saved row must render the friendly name (not a raw UUID).
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend AITemplatesPage.jsx: replaces free-text scope_id input with Selects but the lookup endpoints are wrong (/api/locations and /api/users return 404 — they don't exist on this backend). The correct admin-visible endpoints are /api/tenancy/me/context (locations) and /api/auth/users?role=doctor (providers). Because the free-text input was removed in the same PR, this is a strict regression: admins can no longer save any location- or provider-scoped override. Tenant-scope save still works.

NLBookCard.jsx works end-to-end. Placeholder still says 'Dr. Park' but the parse correctly resolves 'Dr. Carter' to Dr. Noah Carter, so this is cosmetic only. Confidence + clarifications fields are wired but unused in the happy path UI (only 'parsed' marker is rendered). Date prefill via formatLocalDateTimeForInput works correctly across timezones.
NL parse confidence value not currently surfaced in UI — could help users decide whether to confirm or refine. Optional UX add for next iteration.

Backend services/ai/router.py _augment_with_template helper is wired into chart_brief, prior_sections, draft_sections. since_last_diff and semantic search intentionally skipped per minimal-change principle — this matches the request and is documented. Reasonable.

Backend services/scheduling/nl_router.py validates all LLM-suggested IDs against tenant data before returning them — solid hallucination guard. NL create delegates to the canonical create_appointment service so event-bus hooks fire — correct.

test_nl_scheduling.py::test_hallucinated_ids_stripped opens a separate AsyncIOMotorClient with reset_router_for_tests — leaks a connection (no .close() awaited cleanly inside an async runner across tests). Low-priority cleanup.

success_rate.frontend: NL Quick-book 100%; AI Templates picker 0% — Location & Provider dropdowns empty due to wrong API URLs

seed_data_creation: Created 1 real appointment via NL Quick-book confirm: Hannah Whitaker × Dr. Noah Carter on 2026-05-08T10:00 (visible on the doctor's Week view, Fri May 8, 10:00 AM). Tenant-scoped chart_brief/prior_sections/draft_sections override rows created and deleted within the regression suite.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend AI regression remains 100% green over five suites (43+1). NL parse + NL create + template-override propagation all verified with curl in addition to pytest. Only outstanding issue: AITemplatesPage.jsx uses /api/locations and /api/users which return 404. Replace with /api/tenancy/me/context and /api/auth/users?role=doctor. After fix, retest scope=Location and scope=Provider dropdowns and the friendly-name rendering on the list view (currently can't be reached because dropdowns are empty). Hannah Whitaker patient_id=ccms-voice-notes, Dr. Noah Carter provider_id=ccms-voice-notes, doctor tenant. Note: an extra appointment was created on 2026-05-08T10:00 by this iteration's e2e — main agent may want to clean it up if the seed dataset is supposed to be deterministic.
rca of the issue: AITemplatesPage.jsx lines 72-79: Promise.all calls api.get('/locations') and api.get('/users', {params:{role:'doctor'}}). The CCMS backend does not expose /api/locations or /api/users as top-level routes — locations are served via /api/tenancy/me/context (in the response body's .locations[] array) or /api/tenancy/tenants/{id}/locations, and the user listing is at /api/auth/users (verified: GET /api/auth/users?role=doctor returns 200, GET /api/users?role=doctor returns 404). The .catch(() => []) clause swallows the 404, so the Selects render but with zero options. Combined with the same PR removing the free-text scope_id input, admins can only save tenant-scoped overrides via this page until the URLs are corrected.
